ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the region */,
  "region_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone information for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate_to_usd" REAL /* Exchange rate to USD */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_brackets" (
  "weight_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight bracket */,
  "weight_bracket_description" TEXT /* Description of the weight bracket */,
  "min_weight" REAL /* Minimum weight of the bracket */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight of the bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_bracket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping rate */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency */,
  "weight_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weight bracket */,
  "rate" REAL /* Shipping rate for the specified weight bracket */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate became effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_rates_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_rates_weight_bracket_id FOREIGN KEY ("weight_bracket_id") REFERENCES weight_brackets ("weight_bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_rates_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "additional_rates" (
  "additional_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each additional rate */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency */,
  "additional_rate" REAL /* Rate for every additional 500 grams or 1 pound */,
  "additional_weight_unit" TEXT /* Unit of weight for the additional rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("additional_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_additional_rates_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_additional_rates_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the customer is located */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., e-commerce, manufacturing, individual) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for customer contact */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the customer's address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who is shipping */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the shipment */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency for the shipment cost */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date when the shipment was made */,
  "origin_region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the shipment originates */,
  "destination_region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the shipment is destined */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_destination_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_origin_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment cost */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipment */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the shipment */,
  "currency_rate_at_calculation" REAL /* Exchange rate used for cost calculation */,
  "cost_breakdown" TEXT /* Detailed breakdown of the cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_costs_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipment the item is part of */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "item_value" REAL /* Value of the item for insurance purposes */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "item_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_items_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipment */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was generated */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount due for the shipment */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique number for the invoice */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Terms of payment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the payment is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "supported_currencies" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of currencies supported by the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  "authorization_code" TEXT /* Authorization code for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking record */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipment being tracked */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "last_known_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracking_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)
